title: More Jellyfish
description: Addon mod for Jellyfishing which adds many more jellyfish focused around resource production
body:
More Jellyfish adds a whole new set of jellyfish to the Jellyfishing mod, primarily based around ores but some based around other materials (slime, honey, bone meal, etc.)
They can be found in Jellyfishing's biomes and work the same way as the base jellyfish
